normalization_audit.policy: Normalization audit lane: high-confidence Simplified-to-Traditional parser-shadow changes and narrow one-character pinyin-fallout Cantonese lexical repairs are allowed with trace; raw learner display must not be replaced. parser_shadow_repairs is the comprehensive shadow-repair inventory.
normalization_audit.review_reminder: Normalization-audit reminder: even when the normalization audit passes, inspect raw source, parser shadow, trace counts, review-suggestion counts, unsafe-normalization counts, and raw-display preservation before accepting input behavior.

grammar_legitimacy_audit.policy: A clean parser regression is not a grammar-legitimacy pass. Unsupported, pending, heuristic, and lexicalized-only claims remain explicitly visible and block new productive grammar acceptance.

semantic_acceptance_gate.policy: Semantic-acceptance status is an explicit review gate, not parser success. BLOCKED and REVIEW_REQUIRED rows cannot be accepted automatically; MANUAL_REVIEW_ELIGIBLE rows still require human semantic review.

semantic_acceptance.policy: A clean outer construction and full root coverage cannot establish semantic acceptance when any decisive descendant is unknown, dropped, malformed, context-dependent, retired, debunked, or lacks required typed relation provenance.

normalization_audit.policy: Normalization audit lane: parser-shadow normalization may apply high-confidence Simplified-to-Traditional character-form changes and narrow one-character pinyin-fallout Cantonese lexical repairs with visible trace. Raw learner-visible text must not be replaced. Every parser-shadow repair must be represented in parser_shadow_repairs with a note.
normalization_audit.review_reminder: Normalization-audit reminder: even when the normalization audit passes, inspect raw source, parser shadow, trace counts, review-suggestion counts, unsafe-normalization counts, and raw-display preservation before accepting input behavior.

parser_decision_label_policy.eventual_target: all productive grammar should become generative_template once the parser can target POS/slots rather than individual vocabulary

learner_display_audit.policy: Parser/internal slots remain available in diagnostics. Hover titles may expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses, but raw slots and internal counts remain diagnostics-only.

learner_ui_hover_audit.policy: Diagnostic-only mirror of the current default hover/title payload. PASS rows are silent in rendered diagnostics; WARN rows surface raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses such as Cantonese word/text/phrase.

wrapper_coverage_audit.policy: Wrapper coverage audit: ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage, and greedy-looking VPComplementFrame / ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before they may be visually collapsed.

label_transition_audit.policy: Diagnostic inventory for transitioning remaining construction labels/rules toward governed generative templates or accepted structural wrappers. PASS means every construction trace was classified; migration candidates may still remain.

grammar_legitimacy_audit.policy: Fixture success is parser-regression evidence, not proof of Cantonese grammar. Productive acceptance requires independent natural attestations, source diversity, negative boundaries, held-out evidence, competing analyses, and native/expert review when uncertainty remains.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.label: SubjPred
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.negative_boundary_evidence: I01 prospective packet and visible structural boundaries
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.language_claim: Canto Span does not claim that ClauseSpan is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is a neutral internal span representation.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: ClauseSpan groups overt clause material while preserving typed predicate, subject, topic, location, coordination, modal, particle, and relation children. It cannot independently license any of those analyses.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When an existing language-sensitive rule has already identified a complete clause wrapper, the runtime normalizes that wrapper to ClauseSpan. ClauseSpan itself cannot create a clause or missing material.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.label: VP
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.language_claim: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ProductiveVO; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: Canto Span uses ProductiveVO as an internal node label to preserve spans, roles, or relations; the label itself is not asserted to be standard linguistic terminology.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When its current surface and slot cues match, the parser may choose ProductiveVO; this operational decision remains defeasible and must not be treated as language fact.

grammar_legitimacy_audit.reminder: Do not infer language validity from this parser's own fixtures, diagnostics, corpus candidate hits, or sentence-naturalness screening. Native naturalness establishes surface acceptability only; parser analysis remains separately unvalidated.

legend.generative_template: Best signal: matched by the slot-template engine over generated affordances. During the transition, trace detail may show template_family=construction_template for bounded templates that are not yet fully POS-general.
legend.construction_template: Temporary template-family label: bounded or vocabulary/surface-anchored template retained until the grammar can be expressed as a fully generative POS/slot pattern.
legend.generative_or_heuristic_slot_rule: Acceptable interim: structural/slot heuristic, not a full memorized sentence.
legend.governed_discourse_wrapper: Accepted structural wrapper for clause-linking or discourse/coordination sequences. It groups already-parsed clause-like children and is intentionally not a phrase-internal generative template.
legend.predicate_heuristic: Acceptable interim: local predicate wrapper from token features.
legend.atomic_lexicon: Atomic vocabulary lookup. In v0.4.40, registry-backed lexicalized stative tokens may include selection_decision explaining why lexicalized vs compositional won.
legend.selection_decision: Diagnostic detail inside token trace: explains lexicalized-stative registry scoring, forced-compositional exclusions, and ordinary lookup decisions.
legend.feature_bundle: Derived internal feature bundle. Phase 3 permits parser-active use only for migrated stative predicates; non-stative bundles remain parser-inactive.
legend.contextual_role_affordances: Diagnostic-only list of possible context-sensitive roles carried by a token. Context may activate one role, such as doing/movement for 上 in 上嚟, without deleting another valid affordance, such as when/time for 上個禮拜.
legend.surface_specific_phrase_rule: Review: useful transparent rule, but still surface-specific.
legend.legacy_surface_rule: Review: older fallback rule; consider replacing with slot template.
legend.jyutping_audit: Separate pronunciation-quality lane. WARN does not fail parser coverage; it exposes missing/invalid/disagreement Jyutping data for review.
legend.registry_audit: Separate label-hygiene lane. WARN means a token learner role, construction label, parser-decision trace kind/template-family label, or slot name escaped the controlled registry.
legend.learner_display_audit: Separate UI-label lane. Parser/internal slots stay in diagnostics, while hover titles expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses.
legend.learner_ui_hover_audit: Diagnostic-only mirror of current default hover/title strings. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows show learner-facing raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses.
legend.wrapper_coverage_audit: Diagnostic-only wrapper integrity lane. ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage; greedy-looking VPComplementFrame and ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before normal display may collapse them.
legend.label_transition_audit: Diagnostic-only inventory of construction trace families. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows classify unknown trace kinds. Migration-candidate rows are review inventory, not automatic acceptance or failure.
legend.grammar_legitimacy_audit: Separates Cantonese language claims, parser representation decisions, and parser heuristics. Fixture success and corpus candidate hits do not validate a productive grammar rule; unsupported and pending patterns remain quarantined from new grammar acceptance.

semantic_acceptance.policy: A clean outer construction and full root coverage cannot establish semantic acceptance when any decisive descendant is unknown, dropped, malformed, context-dependent, retired, debunked, or lacks required typed relation provenance.

normalization_audit.policy: Normalization audit lane: parser-shadow normalization may apply high-confidence Simplified-to-Traditional character-form changes and narrow one-character pinyin-fallout Cantonese lexical repairs with visible trace. Raw learner-visible text must not be replaced. Every parser-shadow repair must be represented in parser_shadow_repairs with a note.
normalization_audit.review_reminder: Normalization-audit reminder: even when the normalization audit passes, inspect raw source, parser shadow, trace counts, review-suggestion counts, unsafe-normalization counts, and raw-display preservation before accepting input behavior.

parser_decision_label_policy.eventual_target: all productive grammar should become generative_template once the parser can target POS/slots rather than individual vocabulary

learner_display_audit.policy: Parser/internal slots remain available in diagnostics. Hover titles may expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses, but raw slots and internal counts remain diagnostics-only.

learner_ui_hover_audit.policy: Diagnostic-only mirror of the current default hover/title payload. PASS rows are silent in rendered diagnostics; WARN rows surface raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses such as Cantonese word/text/phrase.

wrapper_coverage_audit.policy: Wrapper coverage audit: ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage, and greedy-looking VPComplementFrame / ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before they may be visually collapsed.

label_transition_audit.policy: Diagnostic inventory for transitioning remaining construction labels/rules toward governed generative templates or accepted structural wrappers. PASS means every construction trace was classified; migration candidates may still remain.

grammar_legitimacy_audit.policy: Fixture success is parser-regression evidence, not proof of Cantonese grammar. Productive acceptance requires independent natural attestations, source diversity, negative boundaries, held-out evidence, competing analyses, and native/expert review when uncertainty remains.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.label: SubjPred
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.negative_boundary_evidence: I01 prospective packet and visible structural boundaries
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.language_claim: Canto Span does not claim that ClauseSpan is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is a neutral internal span representation.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: ClauseSpan groups overt clause material while preserving typed predicate, subject, topic, location, coordination, modal, particle, and relation children. It cannot independently license any of those analyses.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When an existing language-sensitive rule has already identified a complete clause wrapper, the runtime normalizes that wrapper to ClauseSpan. ClauseSpan itself cannot create a clause or missing material.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.label: Location

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: Canto Span uses LocativePlacePhrase as an internal node label to preserve spans, roles, or relations; the label itself is not asserted to be standard linguistic terminology.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When its current surface and slot cues match, the parser may choose LocativePlacePhrase; this operational decision remains defeasible and must not be treated as language fact.

  "generative_template": "Best signal: matched by the slot-template engine over generated affordances. During the transition, trace detail may show template_family=construction_template for bounded templates that are not yet fully POS-general.",
  "construction_template": "Temporary template-family label: bounded or vocabulary/surface-anchored template retained until the grammar can be expressed as a fully generative POS/slot pattern.",
  "generative_or_heuristic_slot_rule": "Acceptable interim: structural/slot heuristic, not a full memorized sentence.",

  "contextual_role_affordances": "Diagnostic-only list of possible context-sensitive roles carried by a token. Context may activate one role, such as doing/movement for 上 in 上嚟, without deleting another valid affordance, such as when/time for 上個禮拜.",

  "label_transition_audit": "Diagnostic-only inventory of construction trace families. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows classify unknown trace kinds. Migration-candidate rows are review inventory, not automatic acceptance or failure.",

semantic_acceptance.policy: A clean outer construction and full root coverage cannot establish semantic acceptance when any decisive descendant is unknown, dropped, malformed, context-dependent, retired, debunked, or lacks required typed relation provenance.

normalization_audit.policy: Normalization audit lane: parser-shadow normalization may apply high-confidence Simplified-to-Traditional character-form changes and narrow one-character pinyin-fallout Cantonese lexical repairs with visible trace. Raw learner-visible text must not be replaced. Every parser-shadow repair must be represented in parser_shadow_repairs with a note.
normalization_audit.review_reminder: Normalization-audit reminder: even when the normalization audit passes, inspect raw source, parser shadow, trace counts, review-suggestion counts, unsafe-normalization counts, and raw-display preservation before accepting input behavior.

parser_decision_label_policy.eventual_target: all productive grammar should become generative_template once the parser can target POS/slots rather than individual vocabulary

learner_display_audit.policy: Parser/internal slots remain available in diagnostics. Hover titles may expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses, but raw slots and internal counts remain diagnostics-only.

learner_ui_hover_audit.policy: Diagnostic-only mirror of the current default hover/title payload. PASS rows are silent in rendered diagnostics; WARN rows surface raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses such as Cantonese word/text/phrase.

wrapper_coverage_audit.policy: Wrapper coverage audit: ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage, and greedy-looking VPComplementFrame / ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before they may be visually collapsed.

label_transition_audit.policy: Diagnostic inventory for transitioning remaining construction labels/rules toward governed generative templates or accepted structural wrappers. PASS means every construction trace was classified; migration candidates may still remain.

grammar_legitimacy_audit.policy: Fixture success is parser-regression evidence, not proof of Cantonese grammar. Productive acceptance requires independent natural attestations, source diversity, negative boundaries, held-out evidence, competing analyses, and native/expert review when uncertainty remains.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.label: SubjModal
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.negative_boundary_evidence: I01 prospective packet and visible structural boundaries
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.language_claim: Canto Span does not claim that ClauseSpan is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is a neutral internal span representation.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: ClauseSpan groups overt clause material while preserving typed predicate, subject, topic, location, coordination, modal, particle, and relation children. It cannot independently license any of those analyses.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When an existing language-sensitive rule has already identified a complete clause wrapper, the runtime normalizes that wrapper to ClauseSpan. ClauseSpan itself cannot create a clause or missing material.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.label: ModalVP
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.language_claim: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ModalVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: Canto Span uses ModalVP as an internal node label to preserve spans, roles, or relations; the label itself is not asserted to be standard linguistic terminology.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When its current surface and slot cues match, the parser may choose ModalVP; this operational decision remains defeasible and must not be treated as language fact.

legend.governed_discourse_wrapper: Accepted structural wrapper for clause-linking or discourse/coordination sequences. It groups already-parsed clause-like children and is intentionally not a phrase-internal generative template.
legend.predicate_heuristic: Acceptable interim: local predicate wrapper from token features.

legend.selection_decision: Diagnostic detail inside token trace: explains lexicalized-stative registry scoring, forced-compositional exclusions, and ordinary lookup decisions.
legend.feature_bundle: Derived internal feature bundle. Phase 3 permits parser-active use only for migrated stative predicates; non-stative bundles remain parser-inactive.
legend.contextual_role_affordances: Diagnostic-only list of possible context-sensitive roles carried by a token. Context may activate one role, such as doing/movement for 上 in 上嚟, without deleting another valid affordance, such as when/time for 上個禮拜.
legend.surface_specific_phrase_rule: Review: useful transparent rule, but still surface-specific.
legend.legacy_surface_rule: Review: older fallback rule; consider replacing with slot template.

legend.registry_audit: Separate label-hygiene lane. WARN means a token learner role, construction label, parser-decision trace kind/template-family label, or slot name escaped the controlled registry.
legend.learner_display_audit: Separate UI-label lane. Parser/internal slots stay in diagnostics, while hover titles expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses.
legend.learner_ui_hover_audit: Diagnostic-only mirror of current default hover/title strings. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows show learner-facing raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses.
legend.wrapper_coverage_audit: Diagnostic-only wrapper integrity lane. ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage; greedy-looking VPComplementFrame and ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before normal display may collapse them.
legend.label_transition_audit: Diagnostic-only inventory of construction trace families. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows classify unknown trace kinds. Migration-candidate rows are review inventory, not automatic acceptance or failure.
legend.grammar_legitimacy_audit: Separates Cantonese language claims, parser representation decisions, and parser heuristics. Fixture success and corpus candidate hits do not validate a productive grammar rule; unsupported and pending patterns remain quarantined from new grammar acceptance.

Legend
{
  "generative_template": "Best signal: matched by the slot-template engine over generated affordances. During the transition, trace detail may show template_family=construction_template for bounded templates that are not yet fully POS-general.",
  "construction_template": "Temporary template-family label: bounded or vocabulary/surface-anchored template retained until the grammar can be expressed as a fully generative POS/slot pattern.",
  "generative_or_heuristic_slot_rule": "Acceptable interim: structural/slot heuristic, not a full memorized sentence.",
  "governed_discourse_wrapper": "Accepted structural wrapper for clause-linking or discourse/coordination sequences. It groups already-parsed clause-like children and is intentionally not a phrase-internal generative template.",
  "predicate_heuristic": "Acceptable interim: local predicate wrapper from token features.",
  "atomic_lexicon": "Atomic vocabulary lookup. In v0.4.40, registry-backed lexicalized stative tokens may include selection_decision explaining why lexicalized vs compositional won.",
  "selection_decision": "Diagnostic detail inside token trace: explains lexicalized-stative registry scoring, forced-compositional exclusions, and ordinary lookup decisions.",
  "feature_bundle": "Derived internal feature bundle. Phase 3 permits parser-active use only for migrated stative predicates; non-stative bundles remain parser-inactive.",
  "contextual_role_affordances": "Diagnostic-only list of possible context-sensitive roles carried by a token. Context may activate one role, such as doing/movement for 上 in 上嚟, without deleting another valid affordance, such as when/time for 上個禮拜.",
  "protected_formula_table": "Allowed opacity: formula intentionally protected.",
  "surface_specific_phrase_rule": "Review: useful transparent rule, but still surface-specific.",
  "legacy_surface_rule": "Review: older fallback rule; consider replacing with slot template.",
  "special_ambiguity_rule": "Review/expected: explicit ambiguity handling.",
  "jyutping_audit": "Separate pronunciation-quality lane. WARN does not fail parser coverage; it exposes missing/invalid/disagreement Jyutping data for review.",
  "registry_audit": "Separate label-hygiene lane. WARN means a token learner role, construction label, parser-decision trace kind/template-family label, or slot name escaped the controlled registry.",
  "learner_display_audit": "Separate UI-label lane. Parser/internal slots stay in diagnostics, while hover titles expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses.",
  "learner_ui_hover_audit": "Diagnostic-only mirror of current default hover/title strings. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows show learner-facing raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses.",
  "wrapper_coverage_audit": "Diagnostic-only wrapper integrity lane. ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage; greedy-looking VPComplementFrame and ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before normal display may collapse them.",
  "label_transition_audit": "Diagnostic-only inventory of construction trace families. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows classify unknown trace kinds. Migration-candidate rows are review inventory, not automatic acceptance or failure.",
  "grammar_legitimacy_audit": "Separates Cantonese language claims, parser representation decisions, and parser heuristics. Fixture success and corpus candidate hits do not validate a productive grammar rule; unsupported and pending patterns remain quarantined from new grammar acceptance."
}

semantic_acceptance.policy: A clean outer construction and full root coverage cannot establish semantic acceptance when any decisive descendant is unknown, dropped, malformed, context-dependent, retired, debunked, or lacks required typed relation provenance.

normalization_audit.policy: Normalization audit lane: parser-shadow normalization may apply high-confidence Simplified-to-Traditional character-form changes and narrow one-character pinyin-fallout Cantonese lexical repairs with visible trace. Raw learner-visible text must not be replaced. Every parser-shadow repair must be represented in parser_shadow_repairs with a note.
normalization_audit.review_reminder: Normalization-audit reminder: even when the normalization audit passes, inspect raw source, parser shadow, trace counts, review-suggestion counts, unsafe-normalization counts, and raw-display preservation before accepting input behavior.

parser_decision_label_policy.eventual_target: all productive grammar should become generative_template once the parser can target POS/slots rather than individual vocabulary

learner_display_audit.policy: Parser/internal slots remain available in diagnostics. Hover titles may expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses, but raw slots and internal counts remain diagnostics-only.

learner_ui_hover_audit.policy: Diagnostic-only mirror of the current default hover/title payload. PASS rows are silent in rendered diagnostics; WARN rows surface raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses such as Cantonese word/text/phrase.

wrapper_coverage_audit.policy: Wrapper coverage audit: ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage, and greedy-looking VPComplementFrame / ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before they may be visually collapsed.

label_transition_audit.policy: Diagnostic inventory for transitioning remaining construction labels/rules toward governed generative templates or accepted structural wrappers. PASS means every construction trace was classified; migration candidates may still remain.

grammar_legitimacy_audit.policy: Fixture success is parser-regression evidence, not proof of Cantonese grammar. Productive acceptance requires independent natural attestations, source diversity, negative boundaries, held-out evidence, competing analyses, and native/expert review when uncertainty remains.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.language_claim: Canto Span does not claim that ClauseSpan is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is a neutral internal span representation.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: ClauseSpan groups overt clause material while preserving typed predicate, subject, topic, location, coordination, modal, particle, and relation children. It cannot independently license any of those analyses.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When an existing language-sensitive rule has already identified a complete clause wrapper, the runtime normalizes that wrapper to ClauseSpan. ClauseSpan itself cannot create a clause or missing material.

grammar_legitimacy.negative_boundary_evidence: I01 prospective packet and visible structural boundaries
grammar_legitimacy.language_claim: Canto Span does not claim that ClauseSpan is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is a neutral internal span representation.
grammar_legitimacy.parser_representation_decision: ClauseSpan groups overt clause material while preserving typed predicate, subject, topic, location, coordination, modal, particle, and relation children. It cannot independently license any of those analyses.
grammar_legitimacy.parser_heuristic: When an existing language-sensitive rule has already identified a complete clause wrapper, the runtime normalizes that wrapper to ClauseSpan. ClauseSpan itself cannot create a clause or missing material.

grammar_legitimacy.language_claim: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by LocativePlacePhrase; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
grammar_legitimacy.parser_representation_decision: Canto Span uses LocativePlacePhrase as an internal node label to preserve spans, roles, or relations; the label itself is not asserted to be standard linguistic terminology.
grammar_legitimacy.parser_heuristic: When its current surface and slot cues match, the parser may choose LocativePlacePhrase; this operational decision remains defeasible and must not be treated as language fact.

legend.generative_template: Best signal: matched by the slot-template engine over generated affordances. During the transition, trace detail may show template_family=construction_template for bounded templates that are not yet fully POS-general.
legend.construction_template: Temporary template-family label: bounded or vocabulary/surface-anchored template retained until the grammar can be expressed as a fully generative POS/slot pattern.
legend.generative_or_heuristic_slot_rule: Acceptable interim: structural/slot heuristic, not a full memorized sentence.
legend.governed_discourse_wrapper: Accepted structural wrapper for clause-linking or discourse/coordination sequences. It groups already-parsed clause-like children and is intentionally not a phrase-internal generative template.
legend.predicate_heuristic: Acceptable interim: local predicate wrapper from token features.
legend.atomic_lexicon: Atomic vocabulary lookup. In v0.4.40, registry-backed lexicalized stative tokens may include selection_decision explaining why lexicalized vs compositional won.
legend.selection_decision: Diagnostic detail inside token trace: explains lexicalized-stative registry scoring, forced-compositional exclusions, and ordinary lookup decisions.
legend.feature_bundle: Derived internal feature bundle. Phase 3 permits parser-active use only for migrated stative predicates; non-stative bundles remain parser-inactive.
legend.contextual_role_affordances: Diagnostic-only list of possible context-sensitive roles carried by a token. Context may activate one role, such as doing/movement for 上 in 上嚟, without deleting another valid affordance, such as when/time for 上個禮拜.
legend.surface_specific_phrase_rule: Review: useful transparent rule, but still surface-specific.
legend.legacy_surface_rule: Review: older fallback rule; consider replacing with slot template.
legend.jyutping_audit: Separate pronunciation-quality lane. WARN does not fail parser coverage; it exposes missing/invalid/disagreement Jyutping data for review.
legend.registry_audit: Separate label-hygiene lane. WARN means a token learner role, construction label, parser-decision trace kind/template-family label, or slot name escaped the controlled registry.
legend.learner_display_audit: Separate UI-label lane. Parser/internal slots stay in diagnostics, while hover titles expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses.
legend.learner_ui_hover_audit: Diagnostic-only mirror of current default hover/title strings. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows show learner-facing raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses.
legend.wrapper_coverage_audit: Diagnostic-only wrapper integrity lane. ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage; greedy-looking VPComplementFrame and ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before normal display may collapse them.
legend.label_transition_audit: Diagnostic-only inventory of construction trace families. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows classify unknown trace kinds. Migration-candidate rows are review inventory, not automatic acceptance or failure.
legend.grammar_legitimacy_audit: Separates Cantonese language claims, parser representation decisions, and parser heuristics. Fixture success and corpus candidate hits do not validate a productive grammar rule; unsupported and pending patterns remain quarantined from new grammar acceptance.

Legend
{
  "generative_template": "Best signal: matched by the slot-template engine over generated affordances. During the transition, trace detail may show template_family=construction_template for bounded templates that are not yet fully POS-general.",
  "construction_template": "Temporary template-family label: bounded or vocabulary/surface-anchored template retained until the grammar can be expressed as a fully generative POS/slot pattern.",
  "generative_or_heuristic_slot_rule": "Acceptable interim: structural/slot heuristic, not a full memorized sentence.",
  "governed_discourse_wrapper": "Accepted structural wrapper for clause-linking or discourse/coordination sequences. It groups already-parsed clause-like children and is intentionally not a phrase-internal generative template.",
  "predicate_heuristic": "Acceptable interim: local predicate wrapper from token features.",
  "atomic_lexicon": "Atomic vocabulary lookup. In v0.4.40, registry-backed lexicalized stative tokens may include selection_decision explaining why lexicalized vs compositional won.",
  "selection_decision": "Diagnostic detail inside token trace: explains lexicalized-stative registry scoring, forced-compositional exclusions, and ordinary lookup decisions.",
  "feature_bundle": "Derived internal feature bundle. Phase 3 permits parser-active use only for migrated stative predicates; non-stative bundles remain parser-inactive.",
  "contextual_role_affordances": "Diagnostic-only list of possible context-sensitive roles carried by a token. Context may activate one role, such as doing/movement for 上 in 上嚟, without deleting another valid affordance, such as when/time for 上個禮拜.",
  "protected_formula_table": "Allowed opacity: formula intentionally protected.",
  "surface_specific_phrase_rule": "Review: useful transparent rule, but still surface-specific.",
  "legacy_surface_rule": "Review: older fallback rule; consider replacing with slot template.",
  "special_ambiguity_rule": "Review/expected: explicit ambiguity handling.",
  "jyutping_audit": "Separate pronunciation-quality lane. WARN does not fail parser coverage; it exposes missing/invalid/disagreement Jyutping data for review.",
  "registry_audit": "Separate label-hygiene lane. WARN means a token learner role, construction label, parser-decision trace kind/template-family label, or slot name escaped the controlled registry.",
  "learner_display_audit": "Separate UI-label lane. Parser/internal slots stay in diagnostics, while hover titles expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses.",
  "learner_ui_hover_audit": "Diagnostic-only mirror of current default hover/title strings. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows show learner-facing raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses.",
  "wrapper_coverage_audit": "Diagnostic-only wrapper integrity lane. ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage; greedy-looking VPComplementFrame and ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before normal display may collapse them.",
  "label_transition_audit": "Diagnostic-only inventory of construction trace families. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows classify unknown trace kinds. Migration-candidate rows are review inventory, not automatic acceptance or failure.",
  "grammar_legitimacy_audit": "Separates Cantonese language claims, parser representation decisions, and parser heuristics. Fixture success and corpus candidate hits do not validate a productive grammar rule; unsupported and pending patterns remain quarantined from new grammar acceptance."
}
Diagnostic final review reminder
{
  "reminder": "Final diagnostic reminder: regardless of PASS/WARN/FAIL state, inspect the summary, parser-shadow/raw-display fields, top constructions, learner roles, trace details, and semantic-review flags before accepting this parse."
}

semantic_acceptance.policy: A clean outer construction and full root coverage cannot establish semantic acceptance when any decisive descendant is unknown, dropped, malformed, context-dependent, retired, debunked, or lacks required typed relation provenance.

normalization_audit.policy: Normalization audit lane: parser-shadow normalization may apply high-confidence Simplified-to-Traditional character-form changes and narrow one-character pinyin-fallout Cantonese lexical repairs with visible trace. Raw learner-visible text must not be replaced. Every parser-shadow repair must be represented in parser_shadow_repairs with a note.
normalization_audit.review_reminder: Normalization-audit reminder: even when the normalization audit passes, inspect raw source, parser shadow, trace counts, review-suggestion counts, unsafe-normalization counts, and raw-display preservation before accepting input behavior.

parser_decision_label_policy.eventual_target: all productive grammar should become generative_template once the parser can target POS/slots rather than individual vocabulary

learner_display_audit.policy: Parser/internal slots remain available in diagnostics. Hover titles may expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses, but raw slots and internal counts remain diagnostics-only.

learner_ui_hover_audit.policy: Diagnostic-only mirror of the current default hover/title payload. PASS rows are silent in rendered diagnostics; WARN rows surface raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses such as Cantonese word/text/phrase.

wrapper_coverage_audit.policy: Wrapper coverage audit: ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage, and greedy-looking VPComplementFrame / ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before they may be visually collapsed.

label_transition_audit.policy: Diagnostic inventory for transitioning remaining construction labels/rules toward governed generative templates or accepted structural wrappers. PASS means every construction trace was classified; migration candidates may still remain.

grammar_legitimacy_audit.policy: Fixture success is parser-regression evidence, not proof of Cantonese grammar. Productive acceptance requires independent natural attestations, source diversity, negative boundaries, held-out evidence, competing analyses, and native/expert review when uncertainty remains.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.label: TopicModal
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.negative_boundary_evidence: I01 prospective packet and visible structural boundaries
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.language_claim: Canto Span does not claim that ClauseSpan is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is a neutral internal span representation.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: ClauseSpan groups overt clause material while preserving typed predicate, subject, topic, location, coordination, modal, particle, and relation children. It cannot independently license any of those analyses.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When an existing language-sensitive rule has already identified a complete clause wrapper, the runtime normalizes that wrapper to ClauseSpan. ClauseSpan itself cannot create a clause or missing material.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.label: NP
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.language_claim: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by DemonstrativeClassifierNP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: Canto Span uses DemonstrativeClassifierNP as an internal node label to preserve spans, roles, or relations; the label itself is not asserted to be standard linguistic terminology.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When its current surface and slot cues match, the parser may choose DemonstrativeClassifierNP; this operational decision remains defeasible and must not be treated as language fact.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.label: ModalVP
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.language_claim: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ModalVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: Canto Span uses ModalVP as an internal node label to preserve spans, roles, or relations; the label itself is not asserted to be standard linguistic terminology.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When its current surface and slot cues match, the parser may choose ModalVP; this operational decision remains defeasible and must not be treated as language fact.

grammar_legitimacy_audit.reminder: Do not infer language validity from this parser's own fixtures, diagnostics, corpus candidate hits, or sentence-naturalness screening. Native naturalness establishes surface acceptability only; parser analysis remains separately unvalidated.

grammar_legitimacy_review_rows.parser_representation_decision: ClauseSpan groups overt clause material while preserving typed predicate, subject, topic, location, coordination, modal, particle, and relation children. It cannot independently license any of those analyses.
grammar_legitimacy_review_rows.parser_heuristic: When an existing language-sensitive rule has already identified a complete clause wrapper, the runtime normalizes that wrapper to ClauseSpan. ClauseSpan itself cannot create a clause or missing material.

grammar_legitimacy_review_rows.label: NP
grammar_legitimacy_review_rows.language_claim: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by DemonstrativeClassifierNP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
grammar_legitimacy_review_rows.parser_representation_decision: Canto Span uses DemonstrativeClassifierNP as an internal node label to preserve spans, roles, or relations; the label itself is not asserted to be standard linguistic terminology.
grammar_legitimacy_review_rows.parser_heuristic: When its current surface and slot cues match, the parser may choose DemonstrativeClassifierNP; this operational decision remains defeasible and must not be treated as language fact.

grammar_legitimacy_review_rows.label: ModalVP
grammar_legitimacy_review_rows.language_claim: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by ModalVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
grammar_legitimacy_review_rows.parser_representation_decision: Canto Span uses ModalVP as an internal node label to preserve spans, roles, or relations; the label itself is not asserted to be standard linguistic terminology.
grammar_legitimacy_review_rows.parser_heuristic: When its current surface and slot cues match, the parser may choose ModalVP; this operational decision remains defeasible and must not be treated as language fact.

legend.generative_template: Best signal: matched by the slot-template engine over generated affordances. During the transition, trace detail may show template_family=construction_template for bounded templates that are not yet fully POS-general.
legend.construction_template: Temporary template-family label: bounded or vocabulary/surface-anchored template retained until the grammar can be expressed as a fully generative POS/slot pattern.
legend.generative_or_heuristic_slot_rule: Acceptable interim: structural/slot heuristic, not a full memorized sentence.
legend.governed_discourse_wrapper: Accepted structural wrapper for clause-linking or discourse/coordination sequences. It groups already-parsed clause-like children and is intentionally not a phrase-internal generative template.
legend.predicate_heuristic: Acceptable interim: local predicate wrapper from token features.
legend.atomic_lexicon: Atomic vocabulary lookup. In v0.4.40, registry-backed lexicalized stative tokens may include selection_decision explaining why lexicalized vs compositional won.
legend.selection_decision: Diagnostic detail inside token trace: explains lexicalized-stative registry scoring, forced-compositional exclusions, and ordinary lookup decisions.
legend.feature_bundle: Derived internal feature bundle. Phase 3 permits parser-active use only for migrated stative predicates; non-stative bundles remain parser-inactive.
legend.contextual_role_affordances: Diagnostic-only list of possible context-sensitive roles carried by a token. Context may activate one role, such as doing/movement for 上 in 上嚟, without deleting another valid affordance, such as when/time for 上個禮拜.
legend.surface_specific_phrase_rule: Review: useful transparent rule, but still surface-specific.
legend.legacy_surface_rule: Review: older fallback rule; consider replacing with slot template.
legend.jyutping_audit: Separate pronunciation-quality lane. WARN does not fail parser coverage; it exposes missing/invalid/disagreement Jyutping data for review.
legend.registry_audit: Separate label-hygiene lane. WARN means a token learner role, construction label, parser-decision trace kind/template-family label, or slot name escaped the controlled registry.
legend.learner_display_audit: Separate UI-label lane. Parser/internal slots stay in diagnostics, while hover titles expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses.
legend.learner_ui_hover_audit: Diagnostic-only mirror of current default hover/title strings. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows show learner-facing raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses.
legend.wrapper_coverage_audit: Diagnostic-only wrapper integrity lane. ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage; greedy-looking VPComplementFrame and ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before normal display may collapse them.
legend.label_transition_audit: Diagnostic-only inventory of construction trace families. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows classify unknown trace kinds. Migration-candidate rows are review inventory, not automatic acceptance or failure.
legend.grammar_legitimacy_audit: Separates Cantonese language claims, parser representation decisions, and parser heuristics. Fixture success and corpus candidate hits do not validate a productive grammar rule; unsupported and pending patterns remain quarantined from new grammar acceptance.

Legend
{
  "generative_template": "Best signal: matched by the slot-template engine over generated affordances. During the transition, trace detail may show template_family=construction_template for bounded templates that are not yet fully POS-general.",
  "construction_template": "Temporary template-family label: bounded or vocabulary/surface-anchored template retained until the grammar can be expressed as a fully generative POS/slot pattern.",
  "generative_or_heuristic_slot_rule": "Acceptable interim: structural/slot heuristic, not a full memorized sentence.",
  "governed_discourse_wrapper": "Accepted structural wrapper for clause-linking or discourse/coordination sequences. It groups already-parsed clause-like children and is intentionally not a phrase-internal generative template.",
  "predicate_heuristic": "Acceptable interim: local predicate wrapper from token features.",
  "atomic_lexicon": "Atomic vocabulary lookup. In v0.4.40, registry-backed lexicalized stative tokens may include selection_decision explaining why lexicalized vs compositional won.",
  "selection_decision": "Diagnostic detail inside token trace: explains lexicalized-stative registry scoring, forced-compositional exclusions, and ordinary lookup decisions.",
  "feature_bundle": "Derived internal feature bundle. Phase 3 permits parser-active use only for migrated stative predicates; non-stative bundles remain parser-inactive.",
  "contextual_role_affordances": "Diagnostic-only list of possible context-sensitive roles carried by a token. Context may activate one role, such as doing/movement for 上 in 上嚟, without deleting another valid affordance, such as when/time for 上個禮拜.",
  "protected_formula_table": "Allowed opacity: formula intentionally protected.",
  "surface_specific_phrase_rule": "Review: useful transparent rule, but still surface-specific.",
  "legacy_surface_rule": "Review: older fallback rule; consider replacing with slot template.",
  "special_ambiguity_rule": "Review/expected: explicit ambiguity handling.",
  "jyutping_audit": "Separate pronunciation-quality lane. WARN does not fail parser coverage; it exposes missing/invalid/disagreement Jyutping data for review.",
  "registry_audit": "Separate label-hygiene lane. WARN means a token learner role, construction label, parser-decision trace kind/template-family label, or slot name escaped the controlled registry.",
  "learner_display_audit": "Separate UI-label lane. Parser/internal slots stay in diagnostics, while hover titles expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses.",
  "learner_ui_hover_audit": "Diagnostic-only mirror of current default hover/title strings. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows show learner-facing raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses.",
  "wrapper_coverage_audit": "Diagnostic-only wrapper integrity lane. ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage; greedy-looking VPComplementFrame and ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before normal display may collapse them.",
  "label_transition_audit": "Diagnostic-only inventory of construction trace families. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows classify unknown trace kinds. Migration-candidate rows are review inventory, not automatic acceptance or failure.",
  "grammar_legitimacy_audit": "Separates Cantonese language claims, parser representation decisions, and parser heuristics. Fixture success and corpus candidate hits do not validate a productive grammar rule; unsupported and pending patterns remain quarantined from new grammar acceptance."
}
Diagnostic final review reminder
{
  "reminder": "Final diagnostic reminder: regardless of PASS/WARN/FAIL state, inspect the summary, parser-shadow/raw-display fields, top constructions, learner roles, trace details, and semantic-review flags before accepting this parse."

semantic_acceptance.policy: A clean outer construction and full root coverage cannot establish semantic acceptance when any decisive descendant is unknown, dropped, malformed, context-dependent, retired, debunked, or lacks required typed relation provenance.

normalization_audit.policy: Normalization audit lane: parser-shadow normalization may apply high-confidence Simplified-to-Traditional character-form changes and narrow one-character pinyin-fallout Cantonese lexical repairs with visible trace. Raw learner-visible text must not be replaced. Every parser-shadow repair must be represented in parser_shadow_repairs with a note.
normalization_audit.review_reminder: Normalization-audit reminder: even when the normalization audit passes, inspect raw source, parser shadow, trace counts, review-suggestion counts, unsafe-normalization counts, and raw-display preservation before accepting input behavior.

parser_decision_label_policy.eventual_target: all productive grammar should become generative_template once the parser can target POS/slots rather than individual vocabulary

learner_display_audit.policy: Parser/internal slots remain available in diagnostics. Hover titles may expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses, but raw slots and internal counts remain diagnostics-only.

learner_ui_hover_audit.policy: Diagnostic-only mirror of the current default hover/title payload. PASS rows are silent in rendered diagnostics; WARN rows surface raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses such as Cantonese word/text/phrase.

label_transition_audit.policy: Diagnostic inventory for transitioning remaining construction labels/rules toward governed generative templates or accepted structural wrappers. PASS means every construction trace was classified; migration candidates may still remain.

grammar_legitimacy_audit.policy: Fixture success is parser-regression evidence, not proof of Cantonese grammar. Productive acceptance requires independent natural attestations, source diversity, negative boundaries, held-out evidence, competing analyses, and native/expert review when uncertainty remains.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.label: CoordSubjModal
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.negative_boundary_evidence: I01 prospective packet and visible structural boundaries
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.language_claim: Canto Span does not claim that ClauseSpan is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is a neutral internal span representation.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: ClauseSpan groups overt clause material while preserving typed predicate, subject, topic, location, coordination, modal, particle, and relation children. It cannot independently license any of those analyses.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When an existing language-sensitive rule has already identified a complete clause wrapper, the runtime normalizes that wrapper to ClauseSpan. ClauseSpan itself cannot create a clause or missing material.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.label: CoordNP
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.language_claim: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by CoordinatedNP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: Canto Span uses CoordinatedNP as an internal node label to preserve spans, roles, or relations; the label itself is not asserted to be standard linguistic terminology.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When its current surface and slot cues match, the parser may choose CoordinatedNP; this operational decision remains defeasible and must not be treated as language fact.

legend.generative_template: Best signal: matched by the slot-template engine over generated affordances. During the transition, trace detail may show template_family=construction_template for bounded templates that are not yet fully POS-general.
legend.construction_template: Temporary template-family label: bounded or vocabulary/surface-anchored template retained until the grammar can be expressed as a fully generative POS/slot pattern.
legend.generative_or_heuristic_slot_rule: Acceptable interim: structural/slot heuristic, not a full memorized sentence.
legend.governed_discourse_wrapper: Accepted structural wrapper for clause-linking or discourse/coordination sequences. It groups already-parsed clause-like children and is intentionally not a phrase-internal generative template.
legend.predicate_heuristic: Acceptable interim: local predicate wrapper from token features.
legend.atomic_lexicon: Atomic vocabulary lookup. In v0.4.40, registry-backed lexicalized stative tokens may include selection_decision explaining why lexicalized vs compositional won.
legend.selection_decision: Diagnostic detail inside token trace: explains lexicalized-stative registry scoring, forced-compositional exclusions, and ordinary lookup decisions.
legend.feature_bundle: Derived internal feature bundle. Phase 3 permits parser-active use only for migrated stative predicates; non-stative bundles remain parser-inactive.
legend.contextual_role_affordances: Diagnostic-only list of possible context-sensitive roles carried by a token. Context may activate one role, such as doing/movement for 上 in 上嚟, without deleting another valid affordance, such as when/time for 上個禮拜.
legend.surface_specific_phrase_rule: Review: useful transparent rule, but still surface-specific.
legend.legacy_surface_rule: Review: older fallback rule; consider replacing with slot template.
legend.jyutping_audit: Separate pronunciation-quality lane. WARN does not fail parser coverage; it exposes missing/invalid/disagreement Jyutping data for review.
legend.registry_audit: Separate label-hygiene lane. WARN means a token learner role, construction label, parser-decision trace kind/template-family label, or slot name escaped the controlled registry.
legend.learner_display_audit: Separate UI-label lane. Parser/internal slots stay in diagnostics, while hover titles expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses.
legend.learner_ui_hover_audit: Diagnostic-only mirror of current default hover/title strings. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows show learner-facing raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses.
legend.wrapper_coverage_audit: Diagnostic-only wrapper integrity lane. ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage; greedy-looking VPComplementFrame and ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before normal display may collapse them.
legend.label_transition_audit: Diagnostic-only inventory of construction trace families. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows classify unknown trace kinds. Migration-candidate rows are review inventory, not automatic acceptance or failure.
legend.grammar_legitimacy_audit: Separates Cantonese language claims, parser representation decisions, and parser heuristics. Fixture success and corpus candidate hits do not validate a productive grammar rule; unsupported and pending patterns remain quarantined from new grammar acceptance.

Legend
{
  "generative_template": "Best signal: matched by the slot-template engine over generated affordances. During the transition, trace detail may show template_family=construction_template for bounded templates that are not yet fully POS-general.",
  "construction_template": "Temporary template-family label: bounded or vocabulary/surface-anchored template retained until the grammar can be expressed as a fully generative POS/slot pattern.",
  "generative_or_heuristic_slot_rule": "Acceptable interim: structural/slot heuristic, not a full memorized sentence.",
  "governed_discourse_wrapper": "Accepted structural wrapper for clause-linking or discourse/coordination sequences. It groups already-parsed clause-like children and is intentionally not a phrase-internal generative template.",
  "predicate_heuristic": "Acceptable interim: local predicate wrapper from token features.",
  "atomic_lexicon": "Atomic vocabulary lookup. In v0.4.40, registry-backed lexicalized stative tokens may include selection_decision explaining why lexicalized vs compositional won.",
  "selection_decision": "Diagnostic detail inside token trace: explains lexicalized-stative registry scoring, forced-compositional exclusions, and ordinary lookup decisions.",
  "feature_bundle": "Derived internal feature bundle. Phase 3 permits parser-active use only for migrated stative predicates; non-stative bundles remain parser-inactive.",
  "contextual_role_affordances": "Diagnostic-only list of possible context-sensitive roles carried by a token. Context may activate one role, such as doing/movement for 上 in 上嚟, without deleting another valid affordance, such as when/time for 上個禮拜.",
  "protected_formula_table": "Allowed opacity: formula intentionally protected.",
  "surface_specific_phrase_rule": "Review: useful transparent rule, but still surface-specific.",
  "legacy_surface_rule": "Review: older fallback rule; consider replacing with slot template.",
  "special_ambiguity_rule": "Review/expected: explicit ambiguity handling.",
  "jyutping_audit": "Separate pronunciation-quality lane. WARN does not fail parser coverage; it exposes missing/invalid/disagreement Jyutping data for review.",
  "registry_audit": "Separate label-hygiene lane. WARN means a token learner role, construction label, parser-decision trace kind/template-family label, or slot name escaped the controlled registry.",
  "learner_display_audit": "Separate UI-label lane. Parser/internal slots stay in diagnostics, while hover titles expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses.",
  "learner_ui_hover_audit": "Diagnostic-only mirror of current default hover/title strings. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows show learner-facing raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses.",
  "wrapper_coverage_audit": "Diagnostic-only wrapper integrity lane. ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage; greedy-looking VPComplementFrame and ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before normal display may collapse them.",
  "label_transition_audit": "Diagnostic-only inventory of construction trace families. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows classify unknown trace kinds. Migration-candidate rows are review inventory, not automatic acceptance or failure.",
  "grammar_legitimacy_audit": "Separates Cantonese language claims, parser representation decisions, and parser heuristics. Fixture success and corpus candidate hits do not validate a productive grammar rule; unsupported and pending patterns remain quarantined from new grammar acceptance."
}

  "reminder": "Final diagnostic reminder: regardless of PASS/WARN/FAIL state, inspect the summary, parser-shadow/raw-display fields, top constructions, learner roles, trace details, and semantic-review flags before accepting this parse."

semantic_acceptance.policy: A clean outer construction and full root coverage cannot establish semantic acceptance when any decisive descendant is unknown, dropped, malformed, context-dependent, retired, debunked, or lacks required typed relation provenance.

normalization_audit.policy: Normalization audit lane: parser-shadow normalization may apply high-confidence Simplified-to-Traditional character-form changes and narrow one-character pinyin-fallout Cantonese lexical repairs with visible trace. Raw learner-visible text must not be replaced. Every parser-shadow repair must be represented in parser_shadow_repairs with a note.
normalization_audit.review_reminder: Normalization-audit reminder: even when the normalization audit passes, inspect raw source, parser shadow, trace counts, review-suggestion counts, unsafe-normalization counts, and raw-display preservation before accepting input behavior.

parser_decision_label_policy.eventual_target: all productive grammar should become generative_template once the parser can target POS/slots rather than individual vocabulary

learner_display_audit.policy: Parser/internal slots remain available in diagnostics. Hover titles may expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses, but raw slots and internal counts remain diagnostics-only.

learner_ui_hover_audit.policy: Diagnostic-only mirror of the current default hover/title payload. PASS rows are silent in rendered diagnostics; WARN rows surface raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses such as Cantonese word/text/phrase.

wrapper_coverage_audit.policy: Wrapper coverage audit: ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage, and greedy-looking VPComplementFrame / ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before they may be visually collapsed.

label_transition_audit.policy: Diagnostic inventory for transitioning remaining construction labels/rules toward governed generative templates or accepted structural wrappers. PASS means every construction trace was classified; migration candidates may still remain.

grammar_legitimacy_audit.policy: Fixture success is parser-regression evidence, not proof of Cantonese grammar. Productive acceptance requires independent natural attestations, source diversity, negative boundaries, held-out evidence, competing analyses, and native/expert review when uncertainty remains.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.label: SubjPred
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.negative_boundary_evidence: I01 prospective packet and visible structural boundaries
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.language_claim: Canto Span does not claim that ClauseSpan is a canonical Cantonese construction name; it is a neutral internal span representation.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: ClauseSpan groups overt clause material while preserving typed predicate, subject, topic, location, coordination, modal, particle, and relation children. It cannot independently license any of those analyses.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When an existing language-sensitive rule has already identified a complete clause wrapper, the runtime normalizes that wrapper to ClauseSpan. ClauseSpan itself cannot create a clause or missing material.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.label: NegMotionVP
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.language_claim: Cantonese may instantiate the structural family represented by NegatedDirectionalMotionVP; exact productivity and boundaries require pattern-specific independent evidence.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_representation_decision: Canto Span uses NegatedDirectionalMotionVP as an internal node label to preserve spans, roles, or relations; the label itself is not asserted to be standard linguistic terminology.
rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When its current surface and slot cues match, the parser may choose NegatedDirectionalMotionVP; this operational decision remains defeasible and must not be treated as language fact.

legend.generative_template: Best signal: matched by the slot-template engine over generated affordances. During the transition, trace detail may show template_family=construction_template for bounded templates that are not yet fully POS-general.
legend.construction_template: Temporary template-family label: bounded or vocabulary/surface-anchored template retained until the grammar can be expressed as a fully generative POS/slot pattern.
legend.generative_or_heuristic_slot_rule: Acceptable interim: structural/slot heuristic, not a full memorized sentence.
legend.governed_discourse_wrapper: Accepted structural wrapper for clause-linking or discourse/coordination sequences. It groups already-parsed clause-like children and is intentionally not a phrase-internal generative template.
legend.predicate_heuristic: Acceptable interim: local predicate wrapper from token features.
legend.atomic_lexicon: Atomic vocabulary lookup. In v0.4.40, registry-backed lexicalized stative tokens may include selection_decision explaining why lexicalized vs compositional won.
legend.selection_decision: Diagnostic detail inside token trace: explains lexicalized-stative registry scoring, forced-compositional exclusions, and ordinary lookup decisions.
legend.feature_bundle: Derived internal feature bundle. Phase 3 permits parser-active use only for migrated stative predicates; non-stative bundles remain parser-inactive.
legend.contextual_role_affordances: Diagnostic-only list of possible context-sensitive roles carried by a token. Context may activate one role, such as doing/movement for 上 in 上嚟, without deleting another valid affordance, such as when/time for 上個禮拜.
legend.surface_specific_phrase_rule: Review: useful transparent rule, but still surface-specific.
legend.legacy_surface_rule: Review: older fallback rule; consider replacing with slot template.
legend.jyutping_audit: Separate pronunciation-quality lane. WARN does not fail parser coverage; it exposes missing/invalid/disagreement Jyutping data for review.
legend.registry_audit: Separate label-hygiene lane. WARN means a token learner role, construction label, parser-decision trace kind/template-family label, or slot name escaped the controlled registry.
legend.learner_display_audit: Separate UI-label lane. Parser/internal slots stay in diagnostics, while hover titles expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses.
legend.learner_ui_hover_audit: Diagnostic-only mirror of current default hover/title strings. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows show learner-facing raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses.
legend.wrapper_coverage_audit: Diagnostic-only wrapper integrity lane. ClauseRelationGraph must expose child/linker/separator coverage; greedy-looking VPComplementFrame and ModalANotAQuestion wrappers must expose direct assigned-slot coverage before normal display may collapse them.
legend.label_transition_audit: Diagnostic-only inventory of construction trace families. PASS rows are silent; WARN rows classify unknown trace kinds. Migration-candidate rows are review inventory, not automatic acceptance or failure.
legend.grammar_legitimacy_audit: Separates Cantonese language claims, parser representation decisions, and parser heuristics. Fixture success and corpus candidate hits do not validate a productive grammar rule; unsupported and pending patterns remain quarantined from new grammar acceptance.

semantic_acceptance.policy: A clean outer construction and full root coverage cannot establish semantic acceptance when any decisive descendant is unknown, dropped, malformed, context-dependent, retired, debunked, or lacks required typed relation provenance.

normalization_audit.policy: Normalization audit lane: parser-shadow normalization may apply high-confidence Simplified-to-Traditional character-form changes and narrow one-character pinyin-fallout Cantonese lexical repairs with visible trace. Raw learner-visible text must not be replaced. Every parser-shadow repair must be represented in parser_shadow_repairs with a note.
normalization_audit.review_reminder: Normalization-audit reminder: even when the normalization audit passes, inspect raw source, parser shadow, trace counts, review-suggestion counts, unsafe-normalization counts, and raw-display preservation before accepting input behavior.

parser_decision_label_policy.eventual_target: all productive grammar should become generative_template once the parser can target POS/slots rather than individual vocabulary

learner_display_audit.policy: Parser/internal slots remain available in diagnostics. Hover titles may expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses, but raw slots and internal counts remain diagnostics-only.

learner_ui_hover_audit.policy: Diagnostic-only mirror of the current default hover/title payload. PASS rows are silent in rendered diagnostics; WARN rows surface raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses such as Cantonese word/text/phrase.

label_transition_audit.policy: Diagnostic inventory for transitioning remaining construction labels/rules toward governed generative templates or accepted structural wrappers. PASS means every construction trace was classified; migration candidates may still remain.

grammar_legitimacy_audit.policy: Fixture success is parser-regression evidence, not proof of Cantonese grammar. Productive acceptance requires independent natural attestations, source diversity, negative boundaries, held-out evidence, competing analyses, and native/expert review when uncertainty remains.

rows_requiring_legitimacy_review.parser_heuristic: When its current surface and slot cues match, the parser may choose ProductiveVO; this operational decision remains defeasible and must not be treated as language fact.

semantic_acceptance.policy: A clean outer construction and full root coverage cannot establish semantic acceptance when any decisive descendant is unknown, dropped, malformed, context-dependent, retired, debunked, or lacks required typed relation provenance.

normalization_audit.policy: Normalization audit lane: parser-shadow normalization may apply high-confidence Simplified-to-Traditional character-form changes and narrow one-character pinyin-fallout Cantonese lexical repairs with visible trace. Raw learner-visible text must not be replaced. Every parser-shadow repair must be represented in parser_shadow_repairs with a note.
normalization_audit.review_reminder: Normalization-audit reminder: even when the normalization audit passes, inspect raw source, parser shadow, trace counts, review-suggestion counts, unsafe-normalization counts, and raw-display preservation before accepting input behavior.

parser_decision_label_policy.eventual_target: all productive grammar should become generative_template once the parser can target POS/slots rather than individual vocabulary

learner_display_audit.policy: Parser/internal slots remain available in diagnostics. Hover titles may expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses, but raw slots and internal counts remain diagnostics-only.

learner_ui_hover_audit.policy: Diagnostic-only mirror of the current default hover/title payload. PASS rows are silent in rendered diagnostics; WARN rows surface raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses such as Cantonese word/text/phrase.

semantic_acceptance.policy: A clean outer construction and full root coverage cannot establish semantic acceptance when any decisive descendant is unknown, dropped, malformed, context-dependent, retired, debunked, or lacks required typed relation provenance.

normalization_audit.policy: Normalization audit lane: parser-shadow normalization may apply high-confidence Simplified-to-Traditional character-form changes and narrow one-character pinyin-fallout Cantonese lexical repairs with visible trace. Raw learner-visible text must not be replaced. Every parser-shadow repair must be represented in parser_shadow_repairs with a note.
normalization_audit.review_reminder: Normalization-audit reminder: even when the normalization audit passes, inspect raw source, parser shadow, trace counts, review-suggestion counts, unsafe-normalization counts, and raw-display preservation before accepting input behavior.

parser_decision_label_policy.eventual_target: all productive grammar should become generative_template once the parser can target POS/slots rather than individual vocabulary

learner_display_audit.policy: Parser/internal slots remain available in diagnostics. Hover titles may expose concise role/syntax metadata plus learner glosses, but raw slots and internal counts remain diagnostics-only.

learner_ui_hover_audit.policy: Diagnostic-only mirror of the current default hover/title payload. PASS rows are silent in rendered diagnostics; WARN rows surface raw-slot leaks, missing English learner glosses, or generic fallback glosses such as Cantonese word/text/phrase.

label_transition_audit.policy: Diagnostic inventory for transitioning remaining construction labels/rules toward governed generative templates or accepted structural wrappers. PASS means every construction trace was classified; migration candidates may still remain.

grammar_legitimacy_audit.policy: Fixture success is parser-regression evidence, not proof of Cantonese grammar. Productive acceptance requires independent natural attestations, source diversity, negative boundaries, held-out evidence, competing analyses, and native/expert review when uncertainty remains.
